summary: Bring lint to 0 findings under golangci-lint v2 (config version field + 102 mechanical fixes across 128 files).
reason: Pre-existing press-template debt: `.golangci.yml` lacks `version: "2"` (rejected by v2.x), and emitted code has bare `defer Close()` / `fmt.Fprintf` / bool-constant comparisons / dead helpers / `err == sql.ErrNoRows` patterns that fire errcheck, staticcheck, unused, ineffassign, and errorlint. The same template-level patterns appear across all 131 library CLIs — the durable fix belongs in `cli-printing-press` generator templates; this entry records the local sweep applied to ship this CLI lint-clean while the upstream fix is in flight.
validated_outcome: `golangci-lint run ./...` → 0 issues. `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...` clean. `go test ./...` shows two pre-existing failures in internal/store (parent_id columns absent in subusers_stats/subuser_access typed tables) that are unrelated to the lint sweep.
upstream_issue: TODO: file against mvanhorn/cli-printing-press to fix generator templates for: (1) .golangci.yml version field, (2) defer Close patterns, (3) fmt.Fprintf error discard, (4) bool-constant comparisons, (5) dead Cloudflare-pattern MCP scaffold (mcpParamBinding/makeAPIHandler).
